title: Angel One is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Angel One is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Credit Analyst with drive and ambition, Angel One in Kanpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Angel One:
Angel One is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Angel One!
